examples: This pub had a mixed clientele.
We cater to an exclusive clientele.
A district should serve its clientele, namely students, staff, and parents.
This seems to be the point, though, as the Oak Room tends to draw decidedly upscale clientele.
This glamorous clientele sips bubbly champagne cocktails and highballs like the 1950s Puerto Rican classic, Campari Cooler.
